# SettleInValencia

> AI-powered relocation platform for international professionals, remote workers and families moving to Valencia, Spain.

SettleInValencia turns Valencia relocation into a guided plan: a 6-step assessment, an AI-generated roadmap, a personal dashboard, and a curated network of local lawyers, gestores, real-estate partners and tax advisors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, how it works, services preview and Valencia insights.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): The three-stage process — assessment, AI roadmap, dashboard.
- [Services](/services): Strategy Session (99€), Personal Plan (399€–599€), Concierge (1.500€+).
- [About](/about): The founder and the SettleInValencia approach.
- [Blog](/blog): Field-tested guides on Valencia neighborhoods, visas and taxes.
- [Resources](/resources): Free guides on visas, neighborhoods, padrón / NIE / TIE and the Beckham Law.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach out about your Valencia move.
